description: Maps recurring meeting names/patterns to default parent epic IDs. Patterns are matched case-insensitively against the meeting title or workspace slug.

mappings.pattern: sdv-sw-oh|sdv sw office hours|sdv-sw office hours

notes: Patterns use regex alternation (pipe-separated). Matched case-insensitively.
If a meeting matches, the parent_id is used as the default instead of TBD.
User can still override parent_id per-ticket in tickets.md.
Add new mappings as recurring meetings are identified.
